nasb.text: Even those I will bring to My holy mountain And make them joyful in My house of prayer. Their burnt offerings and their sacrifices will be acceptable on My altar; For My house will be called a house of prayer for all the peoples.”

esv.text: these I will bring to my holy mountain, and make them joyful in my house of prayer; their burnt offerings and their sacrifices will be accepted on my altar; for my house shall be called a house of prayer for all peoples.”

cnv.text: 我必領他們到我的聖山， 使他們在屬於我的禱告的殿中喜樂； 他們的燔祭和祭品，在我的祭壇上必蒙悅納； 因為我的殿必稱為萬族禱告的殿。”

ccb.text: 我必领他们到我的圣山， 到向我祷告的殿内， 使他们欢欣。 他们献上的燔祭和其他祭物必蒙悦纳， 因为我的殿必被称为万民祷告的殿。”

csbs.text: 我必把他们带到我的圣山， 使他们在属我的祷告殿中欢喜； 他们的燔祭和祭物，在我的祭坛上必蒙悦纳； 因为我的殿必称为万民祷告的殿。”
